title: adonis autumnalis var. eriocalycina
intro: Adonis autumnalis var. eriocalycina, also known as Autumn Crocus, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, as it contains alkaloids and other compounds with expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Adonis autumnalis var. eriocalycina include relief from coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as potential anti-cancer and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to soothe respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
